Rate the following movie reviews on a scale from 1 to 5, where 1 is very negative, 3 is neutral, and 5 is very positive:
1. This movie, released on November 18, 2019, was outstanding. The cinematography, acting, and plot were all top-notch.
2. I have never been so disappointed by a film. The story was predictable and the characters were one-dimensional. In my opinion, this is one of the worst movies released in 2022.
3. The movie was okay. There were parts I enjoyed, but also parts that felt lacking. It seems like a fairly average film released in February 2018.
